applications.coverLetter:
I came across the job opening for the Graphic Designer role at LSG, and it seems like a great fit for my background and skills. With 4.5 years of experience as a Backend Engineer, I have a solid foundation in various technologies such as Node.js, TypeScript, and Java, which I believe can complement the creative aspects of this role. 

In my last position at Neutrinos, I was the founding engineer and played a key role in building our entire product line from scratch. This experience not only honed my technical skills but also enhanced my ability to think creatively and collaboratively. I am confident that my technical expertise, combined with my passion for design, would make me a valuable asset to your team.

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to contribute to LSG and would love to discuss how my background aligns with your needs. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you soon.
applications.subject: Application for Graphic Designer — Hritambh Hritvij

applications.coverLetter:
I came across the opening for the Backend Developer role at KKR, and it seems like a great fit for me. With 4.5 years of experience as a Backend Engineer, I have honed my skills in Node.js and Java, developing robust applications and services. In my last role at Neutrinos, I was the founding engineer and built the entire product line from scratch, which gave me hands-on experience with technologies such as Nest.js, Spring Boot, AWS, and PostgreSQL.

I believe my background in microservices, RESTful APIs, and cloud technologies positions me well to contribute to your team. I am particularly drawn to KKR's commitment to innovation and excellence, and I would love the opportunity to discuss how I can bring value to your projects.

I look forward to the possibility of discussing this role further and hope to hear from you soon.
applications.subject: Application for Backend Developer — Hritambh Hritvij
